question: Find the details of the services that have been used by more than 3 times .
sql: SELECT Service_ID, Service_Details FROM Services WHERE Service_ID IN (SELECT Service_ID FROM Customer_Interactions GROUP BY Service_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 3)

filters: Service_ID IN (SELECT Service_ID FROM Customer_Interactions GROUP BY Service_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 3)

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求查询使用次数超过3次的服务详情，SQL通过子查询统计Customer_Interactions中Service_ID的出现次数（GROUP BY Service_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 3），并关联获取Services表中的Service_ID和Service_Details，完全匹配需求。
